calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mary Elizabeth Inn.
Valerie Gold, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Carolina Lertora was present in pro per, placed under oath and testifed.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed on March 27, 2008.

Agreement of the parties was read into the record by Mr. Zanghi.

Pursuant to the stipulation between the parties, judgment shall enter for plaintiff Mary Elizabeth Inn, and against defendant CAROLINA LERTORA as follows:

Plaintiff Mary Elizabeth Inn shall recover from defendant CAROLINA LERTORA unlawful detainer damages in the amount of $1,533.72, attorneys' fees in the amount of $500.00 and Costs in the amount of $273.50, for a Total Judgment for plaintiff Mary Elizabeth Inn in the amount of $2,307.22.
Plaintiff Mary Elizabeth Inn is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1040 Bush Street, Room 312, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

While this judgment may be entered immediately and a writ may issue forthwith, further execution of the writ by eviction is stayed through 2:00 p.m. on May 30, 2008. If defendant complies with the terms set for in the stipulation for entry of judgment, plaintiff shall vacate this judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Off Calendar
